zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_1: $self$有些抱歉地摆摆手。"那个……我想一个人静静，改天吧？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_2: $self$苦笑着指了指自己的状态。"我现在完全动不了了，下次一定陪你。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_3: $self$轻轻推了推对方的手臂。"让我再赖会儿床嘛，好不好？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_4: $self$摇了摇头，语气温和却坚定。"现在不太想动呢，你自己去吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_5: $self$做个了求饶的手势。"放过我吧，我真的需要充电。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_6: $self$笑着拒绝道："这个姿势太舒服了，哪怕是你也别想让我起来。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_7: $self$摆摆手笑道："谢啦，但我现在精神满满，不需要休息。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_8: $self$指了指手头的东西："稍微有点忙，下次吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_9: $self$轻轻摇头："你去吧，我还要等人。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_10: $self$歉意地笑了笑："坐久了腰疼，我想站会儿。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_11: $self$虽然拒绝了，但语气很温柔："我现在不累，你可以自己去。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_12: $self$拍了拍$target$的肩膀："改天吧，现在有点事。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_13: $self$冷笑一声。"你哪只眼睛看到我想和你一起？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_14: $self$直接把抱枕砸了过去。"滚远点，别烦我。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_15: $self$翻了个大大的白眼。"没空，没心情，没兴趣。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_16: $self$语气生硬地回应。"我拒绝，听不懂吗？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_17: $self$看都没看对方一眼。"别做梦了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_18: $self$厌恶地皱起眉头。"离我远点就是最好的休息。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_20: $self$冷冷地回了一句："没兴趣。"便转身离开。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_21: $self$像是听到了笑话一样嗤笑一声："和你一起？算了吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_22: $self$不耐烦地挥手像是在赶苍蝇："离我远点。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_24: $self$双手抱胸，一脸抗拒："不想去，尤其是不想和你去。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_25: $self$自然地靠在了$target$的肩膀上，脸上带着满足的笑。"感觉比一个人舒服多了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_26: $self$偷偷抓住了$target$的手指，轻轻晃了晃。"下次还要一起哦。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_27: $self$侧过身看着$target$，眼神里多了一份依赖。"原来和你在一起这么放松啊。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_28: $self$主动凑近了一些，嗅着$target$身上的味道。"安心的感觉……"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_29: $self$打了个哈欠，像小猫一样蹭了蹭$target$。"困了……借你的肩膀用一下。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_30: $self$闭着眼睛，嘴角却上扬着。"嗯……不讨厌这种感觉。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_31: $self$迅速坐直身体，拉开了与$target$的距离。"好了，差不多了吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_32: $self$有些烦躁地整理着衣服，眉头紧锁。"太挤了，我不习惯。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_33: $self$直接起身下床，拍了拍身上的灰尘。"我要走了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_34: $self$背对着$target$，语气冷淡下来。"下次别再这样了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_35: $self$揉着太阳穴，似乎在压抑着不快。"比我想象中要累。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_36: $self$推开$target$的手，没有任何解释就转身离开。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_1: $self$立刻放下了手里的活："好啊！正好我也累了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_2: $self$开心地挽住$target$的手臂："走吧走吧，我也想休息一下。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_3: $self$点头如捣蒜："求之不得！我都快累散架了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_6: $self$笑着回应："那我们就去那边坐会儿聊聊。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_7: $self$身体颤抖了一下，低着头小声说："我……我知道了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_8: $self$虽然满脸不愿意，但在$target$的注视下还是点了点头。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_9: $self$不敢直视$target$的眼睛，默默地跟在后面。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_10: $self$咬着嘴唇，像是在忍受极大的压力。"好……听你的。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_11: $self$眼神躲闪，脚步沉重地挪动着。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_12: $self$像是认命般叹了口气，没有反抗。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_13: $self$愣了一下，随即点点头："额……好啊，反正也没事。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_14: $self$有些意外地指了指自己："邀请我吗？嗯……行吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_15: $self$虽然有些迟疑，但还是跟上了脚步。"那就稍微休息一下吧。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_16: $self$眨了眨眼，似乎在思考，最后还是同意了。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_19: $self$打了个哈欠，顺势倒在了身后的柔软之中，发出惬意的叹息。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_20: $self$慢吞吞地挪到位置上，像一只准备冬眠的动物一样蜷缩起来。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_21: $self$抱着膝盖坐下，把下巴抵在膝盖上，眼神逐渐放空。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_22: $self$伸了个大大的懒腰，随后整个人陷进了靠垫里。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_23: $self$踢掉鞋子，毫无形象地把自己大字型摊开。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Begin_24: $self$揉了揉酸痛的肩膀，找了个舒服的姿势躺了下来。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Tryjoin_1: $self$走到正在休息的$target$身边："介意我也坐这儿吗？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Tryjoin_2: $self$有些疲惫地指了指旁边的空位："能拼个座吗？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Tryjoin_3: $self$笑着问："这里有人吗？我也想歇会儿。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Tryjoin_4: $self$自然地走过去："一个人休息多无聊，加我一个呗。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Tryjoin_6: $self$有些不好意思地开口："那个……我也能坐下吗？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_1: $self$充满歉意地指了指旁边的包："抱歉，这里有人了。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_2: $self$有些为难地笑了笑："不好意思，我想一个人静静。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_3: $self$双手合十："下次吧，现在稍微有点不方便。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_4: $self$摇摇头："这里太挤了，你可以去那边坐。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_5: $self$温和地拒绝："我想自己待会儿，抱歉啦。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_6: $self$指了指耳机，示意自己正在听东西不方便被打扰。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_7: $self$立刻把腿架在了空位上："这儿有人了，滚。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_9: $self$嫌弃地皱眉："别坐我对面，看着烦。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_11: $self$嘲讽地笑了笑："你是听不懂人话还是看不懂眼色？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_12: $self$用力拍了一下桌子："别来烦我！"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_13: $self$立刻把占座的东西拿开："快坐快坐！"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_14: $self$往里面挪了挪，拍着身边的位置："来，坐这儿。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_15: $self$笑着抬头："正如我意，一个人正好无聊呢。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_18: $self$看起来很高兴有人来陪："请坐请坐！"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_19: $self$吓得立刻缩成一团，让出了大半个位置。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_20: $self$虽然害怕，但还是颤抖着点了点头。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_21: $self$低着头不敢看$target$，身体尽量往角落里缩。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_22: $self$脸色苍白，紧紧抱着自己的膝盖，默许了$target$的行为。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_23: $self$像是受惊的小动物一样，一动不敢动。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_24: $self$屏住呼吸，眼神里满是恐惧，却不敢说不。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_25: $self$略显惊讶地抬头，然后点了点头。"嗯，你随意。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_26: $self$虽然有些意外，但还是默默挪开了一点位置。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_27: $self$从书本后探出头看了看，没说什么便默许了。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Join_28: $self$有些发愣，反应过来后才说："哦……可以啊。"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_1: $self$安静地闭着眼睛，呼吸平稳而绵长。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_2: $self$手里拿着手机漫无目的地滑动，身体一动不动。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_3: $self$盯着天花板发呆，似乎完全沉浸在自己的世界里。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_4: $self$抱着抱枕翻了个身，嘴里嘟囔着听不清的梦话。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_5: $self$像雕塑一样维持着瘫倒的姿势，只有手指偶尔动弹一下。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Ongoing_6: $self$把脸埋在枕头里，享受着片刻的宁静。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_1: $self$看到$target$靠近，下意识地缩起了肩膀，显得有些不知所措。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_2: $self$慌乱地站起身想要离开，眼神游移不定。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_3: $self$坐在位置上瑟瑟发抖，甚至不敢与$target$对视。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_4: $self$紧紧抓着沙发的扶手，指节因为用力而发白。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_5: $self$屏住了呼吸，尽量降低自己的存在感。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_6: $self$眼神里充满了警惕，身体处于随时准备逃跑的状态。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_7: $self$看到是$target$，立刻把脸别向了一边，假装没看见。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_8: $self$原本放松的身体瞬间紧绷，眉头不自觉地皱了起来。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_9: $self$甚至没有抬头，直接掏出耳机戴上，隔绝了外界。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_10: $self$冷哼一声，故意把腿伸长，挡住了$target$的路。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_11: $self$用眼角的余光瞥了$target$一眼，眼神里满是不屑。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_12: $self$烦躁地啧了一声，换了个背对$target$的坐姿。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_13: $self$看到$target$，立刻坐直了身体，脸上露出了开心的笑容。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_14: $self$往旁边挪了挪，拍拍身边的空位示意$target$坐下。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_15: $self$原本有些困倦的眼神在看到$target$后瞬间有了神采。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_16: $self$笑着对$target$挥了挥手："这么巧，你也来休息？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_17: $self$并没有起身，而是懒洋洋地对$target$打了个招呼。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_18: $self$指了指桌上的水，似乎想问$target$要不要喝点什么。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_19: $self$上下打量着$target$，嘴角勾起一抹意味深长的弧度。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_20: $self$故意换了个更显身材的慵懒姿势，眼神火热地盯着$target$。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_21: $self$轻咬着下唇，视线黏在$target$身上移不开。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_22: $self$用一种甜腻的声音主动开口："既然来了，不陪我坐会儿吗？"
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_23: $self$双腿交叠，脚尖若有若无地指向$target$的方向。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_24: $self$脸颊微红，看着$target$的眼神里仿佛能滴出水来。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_25: $self$只是淡淡地看了$target$一眼，便收回了目光。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_26: $self$礼貌性地点了点头，没有说话。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_27: $self$继续玩着手机，并没有因为$target$的出现而改变什么。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_28: $self$稍微往旁边让了一点位置，算是打过招呼。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_29: $self$打了个哈欠，眼神依旧有些迷离。
zh-cn.com_furniture_takingBreak_Interrupt_30: $self$并没有太大的反应，继续维持着原本的姿势。

en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_1: $self$ waves a hand apologetically. "Umm... I just want to be alone for a bit, maybe another time?"
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_2: $self$ smiles bitterly and points to her state. "I can't move at all right now, I'll definitely join you next time."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_3: $self$ gently nudges the other's arm. "Let me stay in bed a little longer, okay?"
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_4: $self$ shakes her head, her tone gentle but firm. "I don't really feel like moving right now, you go ahead."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_5: $self$ makes a gesture of begging for mercy. "Spare me, I really need to recharge."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_6: $self$ laughs and refuses: "This position is too comfortable, even you can't make me get up."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_7: $self$ waves her hand and laughs: "Thanks, but I'm full of energy right now, I don't need a rest."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_8: $self$ points to the things at hand: "I'm a bit busy, next time."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_9: $self$ shakes her head gently: "You go, I have to wait for someone."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_10: $self$ smiles apologetically: "My back hurts from sitting too long, I want to stand for a while."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_11: $self$ refuses, but in a gentle tone: "I'm not tired right now, you can go by yourself."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_12: $self$ pats $target$'s shoulder: "Another day, I have something to do now."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_13: $self$ sneers. "With which eye did you see that I wanted to be with you?"
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_14: $self$ throws the pillow directly over. "Get away, don't bother me."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_15: $self$ rolls her eyes hugely. "No time, no mood, no interest."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_16: $self$ responds stiffly. "I refuse, can't you understand?"
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_17: $self$ doesn't even look at the other person. "Keep dreaming."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_18: $self$ frowns in disgust. "Staying away from me is the best rest."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_19: $self$ rolls her eyes: "No time, don't annoy me."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_20: $self$ replies coldly: "Not interested." and turns to leave.
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_21: $self$ snorts as if hearing a joke: "With you? Forget it."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_22: $self$ waves impatiently as if shooing away a fly: "Stay away from me."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_23: $self$ ignores $target$'s invitation and walks away directly.
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_24: $self$ crosses her arms, looking resistant: "I don't want to go, especially not with you."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_25: $self$ leans naturally on $target$'s shoulder, with a satisfied smile on her face. "It feels much better than being alone."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_26: $self$ secretly grabs $target$'s fingers and shakes them gently. "We must do this together next time too."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_27: $self$ turns sideways to look at $target$, with a look of dependence in her eyes. "So it's this relaxing to be with you."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_28: $self$ actively leans closer, sniffing the scent on $target$. "A feeling of peace..."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_29: $self$ yawns and rubs against $target$ like a kitten. "Sleepy... lend me your shoulder."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_30: $self$ closes her eyes, but the corners of her mouth are raised. "Hmm... I don't dislike this feeling."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_31: $self$ sits up straight quickly, distancing herself from $target$. "Okay, that's enough."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_32: $self$ adjusts her clothes with some irritation, frowning. "Too crowded, I'm not used to it."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_33: $self$ gets out of bed directly, patting the dust off her body. "I'm leaving."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_34: $self$ turns her back to $target$, her tone becoming cold. "Don't do this again next time."
en-us.com_furniture_takingBreak_35: $self$ rubs her temples, seeming to suppress unhappiness. "It's more tiring than I thought."
